ast.source: Configure symbols that represent planned tasks in square brackets

ast.source: Configure symbols that represent tasks in progress in square brackets

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure symbols that represent abandoned tasks in square brackets
ast.target: 配置方括号中表示已放弃任务的符号

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure symbols that represent not started tasks in square brackets. Default is space " "
ast.target: 配置方括号中表示未开始任务的符号。默认是空格 " "

ast.name: description
ast.source: You can customize the progress bar behind the parent task(usually at the end of the task). You can also customize the progress bar for the task below the heading.
ast.target: 你可以自定义父任务后面的进度条（通常在任务末尾）。也可以为标题下的任务自定义进度条。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how to display task progress
ast.target: 选择任务进度的显示方式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to allow this plugin to show progress bars in reading mode.
ast.target: 切换此项以允许该插件在阅读模式下显示进度条。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to allow this plugin to show progress info when hovering over the progress bar.
ast.target: 切换此项以允许该插件在悬停于进度条时显示进度信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to allow this plugin to add progress bar for Task below the headings.
ast.target: 切换此项以允许该插件为标题下的任务添加进度条。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to allow this plugin to count sub tasks when generating progress bar.
ast.target: 切换此项以允许该插件在生成进度条时统计子任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to allow this plugin to find the pattern g::number as goal of the parent task.
ast.target: 切换此项以允许该插件将模式 g::number 识别为父任务的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how to display the task progress
ast.target: 选择任务进度的显示方式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable hiding progress bars based on tags, folders, or metadata.
ast.target: 切换此项以根据标签、文件夹或元数据隐藏进度条。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure how tasks inherit metadata from file frontmatter
ast.target: 配置任务如何从文件 frontmatter 继承元数据

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow tasks to inherit metadata properties from their file's frontmatter
ast.target: 允许任务从其文件的 frontmatter 继承元数据属性

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to allow this plugin to auto complete parent checkbox when all child tasks are completed.
ast.target: 启用后，当所有子任务完成时，此插件会自动勾选父任务复选框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When some but not all child tasks are completed, mark the parent checkbox as 'In Progress'. Only works when 'Auto complete parent' is enabled.
ast.target: 当部分子任务完成但未全部完成时，将父任务复选框标记为“进行中”。仅在启用“自动完成父任务”时生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Characters in square brackets that represent completed tasks. Example: "x|X"
ast.target: 方括号中表示已完成任务的字符。示例：“x|X”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Characters in square brackets that represent planned tasks. Example: "?"
ast.target: 方括号中表示计划任务的字符。示例：“?”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Characters in square brackets that represent tasks in progress. Example: ">|/"
ast.target: 方括号中表示进行中任务的字符。示例：“>|/”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Characters in square brackets that represent abandoned tasks. Example: "-"
ast.target: 方括号中表示已放弃任务的字符。示例：“-”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Characters in square brackets that represent not started tasks. Default is space " "
ast.target: 方括号中表示未开始任务的字符。默认为空格“ ”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle to enable keyboard shortcuts for setting task priorities.
ast.target: 启用用于设置任务优先级的键盘快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable date picker for tasks. This will add a calendar icon near your tasks which you can click to select a date.
ast.target: 启用任务日期选择器。这会在任务旁添加一个日历图标，点击即可选择日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how to calculate the next date for recurring tasks
ast.target: 选择如何计算重复任务的下一个日期

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable the task filter panel

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create and manage preset filters for quick access to commonly used task filters.
ast.target: 创建并管理预设筛选器，以快速访问常用任务筛选条件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable file and folder filtering during task indexing. This can significantly improve performance for large vaults.
ast.target: 启用在任务索引过程中进行文件和文件夹筛选。这可以显著提升大型库的性能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure which files and folders to include or exclude from task indexing
ast.target: 配置任务索引中要包含或排除的文件和文件夹

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable the task gutter.
ast.target: 切换此项以启用任务边栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable commands for moving completed tasks to another file.
ast.target: 切换此项以启用将已完成任务移至另一文件的命令。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure how tasks are sorted in the document.
ast.target: 配置文档中任务的排序方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable commands for sorting tasks.
ast.target: 切换此项以启用任务排序命令。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically add a timestamp to the task when it is created
ast.target: 创建任务时自动添加时间戳

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically create a new task with the next stage when completing a task
ast.target: 完成任务时自动创建下一个阶段的新任务

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable Org-mode style quick capture panel.
ast.target: 切换此项以启用 Org-mode 风格的快速捕捉面板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose whether to capture to a fixed file or daily note
ast.target: 选择捕捉到固定文件还是每日笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable simplified single-line quick capture with inline suggestions
ast.target: 启用带内联建议的简化单行快速捕捉

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically parse natural language time expressions in Quick Capture
ast.target: 在快速捕捉中自动解析自然语言时间表达

ast.name: description
ast.target: 指示开始日期的关键字（逗号分隔）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle this to enable the timeline sidebar view for quick access to your daily events and tasks.
ast.target: 切换此项以启用时间线侧边栏视图，便于快速访问每日事件和任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically open the timeline sidebar when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 启动时自动打开时间线侧边栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include completed tasks in the timeline view. When disabled, only incomplete tasks will be shown.
ast.target: 在时间线视图中包含已完成的任务。禁用时，仅显示未完成的任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable path-based, metadata-based, and config file-based project detection
ast.target: 启用基于路径、元数据和配置文件的项目检测

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure project names based on file paths
ast.target: 根据文件路径配置项目名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure project detection from file frontmatter
ast.target: 根据文件 frontmatter 配置项目检测

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure the Task Genius sidebar views, visibility, order, and create custom views.
ast.target: 配置 Task Genius 侧边栏视图、可见性、顺序，并创建自定义视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable task genius view will also enable the task genius indexer, which will provide the task genius view results from whole vault.
ast.target: 启用 task genius 视图也会启用 task genius 索引器，它将提供来自整个仓库的 task genius 视图结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose the default display mode for all views. This affects how tasks are displayed when you first open a view or create a new view.
ast.target: 选择所有视图的默认显示模式。这将影响首次打开视图或创建新视图时任务的显示方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: You can choose dataview format or tasks format, that will influence both index and save format.
ast.target: 你可以选择 dataview 格式或 tasks 格式，这将影响索引和保存格式。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 选择获得奖励时的显示方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Define different levels of reward rarity and their probability.
ast.target: 定义不同等级的奖励稀有度及其概率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manage the specific rewards that can be obtained.
ast.target: 管理可获得的具体奖励。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 配置习惯设置，包括添加新习惯、编辑现有习惯以及管理习惯完成情况。

ast.source: Update a single task's completion or status field.
ast.target: 更新单个任务的完成情况或状态字段。

ast.target: 可选的状态标记，用于替代已完成

ast.target: 批量更新多个任务的完成情况/状态。

ast.target: 将任务批量延期到新的到期日期（YYYY-MM-DD）

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all used tags, project names, and contexts.
ast.target: 列出所有已使用的标签、项目名称和上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List tasks for a day/month/year based on dateType (default: due).
ast.target: 根据 dateType 列出某天/某月/某年的任务（默认：due）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List tasks between from/to dates (default dateType: due).
ast.target: 列出起止日期之间的任务（默认 dateType：due）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a project-tagged task to the Quick Capture target (fixed or daily note).
ast.target: 将带项目标签的任务添加到快速捕获目标（固定或每日笔记）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 标记为 +project 的项目名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a task in today's daily note. Creates the note if missing. Supports creating already-completed tasks for recording purposes.
ast.target: 在今天的每日笔记中创建任务。如笔记不存在则创建。支持创建已完成任务用于记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional heading to place task under
ast.target: 可选的标题，用于放置任务

ast.source: Optional parent task ID to create subtask under

ast.target: 任务是否已完成（用于记录）

ast.target: 完成日期 YYYY-MM-DD（仅在 completed 为 true 时使用）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Query tasks with filters and sorting options
ast.target: 使用筛选和排序选项查询任务

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only return these fields to reduce token usage (e.g., ['id', 'content', 'completed', 'metadata.priority']). Supports dot notation for nested fields.
ast.target: 仅返回这些字段以减少 token 使用（例如：['id', 'content', 'completed', 'metadata.priority']）。支持对嵌套字段使用点表示法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update a task by ID with new properties
ast.target: 按 ID 使用新属性更新任务

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new task with specified properties. If the target file does not exist, it will be created automatically. Supports creating already-completed tasks for recording purposes.
ast.target: 使用指定属性创建新任务。如果目标文件不存在，将自动创建。支持创建已完成任务用于记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target markdown file path (e.g., Daily/2025-08-15.md). If omitted, uses active file.
ast.target: 目标 Markdown 文件路径（例如：Daily/2025-08-15.md）。如省略，则使用当前活动文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
Provide a comprehensive overview of all my projects including:
1. List of all active projects
2. Task count per project (pending vs completed)
3. Projects with upcoming deadlines
4. Projects that may need more attention
5. Overall project health assessment
ast.target:
提供我所有项目的综合概览，包括：
1. 所有进行中项目列表
2. 每个项目的任务数量（待处理 vs 已完成）
3. 即将到期的项目
4. 可能需要更多关注的项目
5. 整体项目健康评估
